per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, cancel_rate FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%marketplace%'

per_question.question: Сколько всего story points у команды cthulhu?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(storypoints_act) FROM report_agile_dashboard WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%cthu%'

per_question.question: Сколько задач каждого типа у команды lpop?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT issue_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM report_agile_dashboard WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%lpop%' GROUP BY issue_type;

per_question.question: Распределение задач по статусам у команды cthulhu
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT issue_status_act, COUNT(*) as count FROM report_agile_dashboard WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%cthu%' GROUP BY issue_status_act;

per_question.question: У какой команды самый высокий done_total?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(done_total) AS done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY done_total DESC LIMIT 1;

per_question.question: У какой команды самый большой scope drop?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(scope_drop) AS avg_scope_drop FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE sprint_state = 'closed' GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY avg_scope_drop DESC;

per_question.question: Топ-3 команды по количеству задач
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, COUNT(*) as task_count FROM report_agile_dashboard GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY task_count DESC LIMIT 3;

per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(done_total) AS avg_done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%cthu%' GROUP BY feature_teams;

per_question.question: Среднее done total команды marketplace за все спринты
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(done_total) AS avg_done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%marketplace%' GROUP BY feature_teams;

per_question.question: Средняя velocity команды linehaul
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(complete_sp) AS velocity FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%linehaul%' GROUP BY feature_teams;

per_question.question: Средний scope drop у команды shopping cart
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(scope_drop) AS avg_scope_drop FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%shopping cart%' GROUP BY feature_teams;

per_question.question: Средний done total по каждой команде
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(done_total) AS avg_done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics GROUP BY feature_teams;

per_question.question: Средний scope drop по каждой команде
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(scope_drop) AS avg_scope_drop FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics GROUP BY feature_teams;

per_question.question: Какой максимальный story points у одной задачи?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT MAX(storypoints_act) FROM report_agile_dashboard;

per_question.question: Какой минимальный done total среди всех команд и спринтов?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT MIN(done_total) FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics;

per_question.question: В каком спринте был самый большой scope drop?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT sprint_name, scope_drop FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics ORDER BY scope_drop DESC LIMIT 1;

per_question.question: Сколько задач в каждом кластере?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT cluster, COUNT(*) FROM report_agile_dashboard GROUP BY cluster;

per_question.question: Сколько задач со статусом Done в каждом кластере?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT cluster, COUNT(*) FROM report_agile_dashboard WHERE issue_status_act = 'Done' GROUP BY cluster;

per_question.question: Сколько задач у команды shopping cart в каждом спринте?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, sprint_name, COUNT(*) as task_count FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%shopping cart%' GROUP BY feature_teams, sprint_name ORDER BY sprint_name;

per_question.question: Суммарная velocity команды rint за все спринты
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(complete_sp) FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%rint%'

per_question.question: Сколько всего SP было добавлено в спринты команды shopping cart?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(added_work_sp) FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%shopping cart%';

per_question.question: Какие команды имеют средний done total ниже 80%?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(done_total) AS avg_done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE sprint_state = 'closed' GROUP BY feature_teams HAVING AVG(done_total) < 80;

per_question.question: Команды со средним scope drop больше 25%
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(scope_drop) AS avg_scope_drop FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE scope_drop IS NOT NULL GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY avg_scope_drop DESC;

per_question.question: Кластеры, в которых больше 100 задач
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT cluster, COUNT(*) as count FROM report_agile_dashboard GROUP BY cluster HAVING COUNT(*) > 100;

per_question.question: Средний размер Story в story points
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT AVG(storypoints_act) FROM report_agile_dashboard WHERE issue_type = 'Story';

per_question.question: Средний размер бага в story points
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT AVG(storypoints_act) FROM report_agile_dashboard WHERE issue_type = 'Bug';

per_question.question: Топ-5 команд по средней velocity
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(complete_sp) AS velocity FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE sprint_state = 'closed' GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY velocity DESC LIMIT 5;

per_question.question: Топ-3 команды по количеству багов
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, COUNT(*) as bug_count FROM report_agile_dashboard WHERE issue_type = 'Bug' GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY bug_count DESC LIMIT 3;

per_question.question: Средний done total команды несуществующая_команда
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(done_total) AS avg_done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%несуществующая_команда%' GROUP BY feature_teams;
